message:
feat(ui,test): add CASS_TUI_EXIT_AFTER_PLAYBACK env var and replace macro playback with PTY typing in latency test

- Add exit_after_macro_playback_from_env() that reads CASS_TUI_EXIT_AFTER_PLAYBACK
  env var (accepts 1/true/yes/on) and triggers ftui::Cmd::quit() after
  macro playback completes, enabling headless test runs to exit cleanly
  without relying on an Escape key in the macro
- Simplify progressive search service clone check: replace if-let-Some
  with is_some() boolean check since the service value is not used
- Rewrite tui_play_macro_writes_latency_trace test to use direct PTY
  byte-by-byte typing with inter-key delays instead of file-based macro
  playback, removing the write_query_playback_macro helper entirely —
  this eliminates flaky timing issues from macro file synchronization
  and makes the test more representative of real user interaction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
